name: SAP Joule
arrSource: SAP commentary — 'Joule bundled free in RISE/GROW; 2/3 of deals include AI'; no separate metering. Editorial midpoint of $0-200M range.

arrClaimedVsReal.realNote: Like saying '100% of iPhones include Siri.' Cloud growth (23%) driven by S/4HANA forced migration, not Joule.

narrative.claimed: "2/3 of deals include AI" — Joule bundled free in RISE/GROW
narrative.usage: No separate metering. No AI revenue disclosed = immaterial.
narrative.real: ~$0-200M. Like saying "100% of iPhones include Siri"
narrative.flags: Cloud growth (23%) driven by S/4HANA forced migration (ECC end-of-life 2027), NOT AI. No analyst attributes growth to Joule.
